shared_contract.adjudication: Known-status agreement, known-status disagreement, and definitive answers without a known status are separate. Missing status never supplies correctness evidence.
shared_contract.coverage_class: Axeyum-relative observed decide rate: decide-strong >=80%, partial >=20%, frontier <20%; it is not an intrinsic difficulty label.
shared_contract.deduplicated_denominator: Unique exact-content SHA-256 values among file-backed cases. Aggregate-only cases remain separate and are never fabricated as files.
shared_contract.exact_content: SHA-256 of the exact benchmark bytes. This detects byte-identical aliases but not semantic or near duplicates.
shared_contract.near_duplicate: Not measured in v1. Exact-content deduplication must not be described as semantic deduplication.
shared_contract.neutral_oracle: At least one non-Z3 external solver on the exact same population and configuration. A solver that supplied corpus files is not thereby an oracle.
shared_contract.normalized_id: A repository-independent benchmark path after a declared corpus marker; identity is weaker than content identity.
shared_contract.par2: Mean wall-clock PAR-2 within one row and its recorded wall limit. No cross-row or cross-regime PAR-2 is computed.
shared_contract.raw_denominator: Every recorded benchmark occurrence in the regime, including repeated paths and aggregate-only synthetic cases.
shared_contract.source_balance: Reported as strata only. V1 does not invent a weighted aggregate across source families or regimes.
